summary: Coach Watch Persuasion Copy and Confidence Level features - All tests passed. Backend returns new fields whyThisMatters and confidenceLevel per state. Frontend CoachWatchCard displays both new layers correctly with proper styling (italic for why-this-matters, shield icons for confidence badge).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: _WHY_THIS_MATTERS dict covers all 10 states with persuasive copy
Backend: _CONFIDENCE_LEVEL dict correctly maps high→hot_opportunity/active_conversation, low→no_signals/deprioritize, medium→all others
Backend: _compute_coach_watch() returns whyThisMatters and confidenceLevel from dicts at lines 412-413
Frontend: CoachWatchCard uses CONFIDENCE_META for badge rendering with correct Shield icons (ShieldCheck=green/high, Shield=amber/medium, ShieldAlert=gray/low)
Frontend: Why-this-matters text renders in italic style (line 87)
Frontend: All data-testid attributes present: cw-why-this-matters, cw-confidence
Additive changes only - existing headline, summary, whyLine, recommendedAction unchanged
context_for_next_testing_agent: New Coach Watch layers complete: whyThisMatters (persuasion copy) and confidenceLevel (high/medium/low badge). Key data-testid: cw-why-this-matters, cw-confidence. Confidence mapping: hot_opportunity→high, active_conversation→high, no_signals→low, deprioritize→low, others→medium.

verified_requirements.Stanford (hot_opportunity) whyThisMatter: ✅ 'This is a high-opportunity moment — acting quickly can make a big difference.'
verified_requirements.Creighton (no_signals) whyThisMatters: ✅ 'Starting outreach now gives you the best chance to get on the coach's radar early.'
verified_requirements.UCLA (active_conversation) whyThisMatter: ✅ 'Fast responses keep momentum and show strong interest.'
verified_requirements.Florida (deprioritize) whyThisMatters: ✅ 'Your time is better spent on schools showing stronger signals.'
verified_requirements.Stanford shows 'High confidence' badge: ✅ Green ShieldCheck icon with 'High confidence' text
verified_requirements.Creighton shows 'Low confidence' badge: ✅ Gray ShieldAlert icon with 'Low confidence' text
